content:
Grants absolute knowledge of a single final challenge in advance.


✅ Why This Works:
• Ties all RPG mechanics to literature and mythology, reinforcing course themes.
• Ensures weapons, armor, and artifacts feel meaningful beyond gameplay.
• Provides a sense of discovery—students may not know what each artifact does immediately.

📜 2. Scribe Mechanics – Recording the Night & Their Unique Choice

📜 Each week, a student is randomly selected as The Scribe, with two options.

✔ The Scribe may “Stand Neutral” under the professor’s protection (they remain uninvolved).
✔ The Scribe may “Join the Chaos” and be affected by class victories and failures.
context: From document: RPG Character System (Fully Integrated into Weekly Modules) — chunk 314 (chunk 314/555)
